title: genista tinctoria subsp. pubescens
intro: Genista tinctoria subsp. pubescens, also known as the small-flowered broom or pubescent broom, is a subspecies of the broom plant, a legume native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea, and act as a natural laxative, making it useful for treating digestive issues. The health benefits of Genista tinctoria subsp. pubescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves can be used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
